title: Tlater Coffee to go Mug, 380 ml, with Leak-Proof lid, Double-Walled, Stainless Steel, for Coffee and Tea (Black)
features: 【Keep Warm and Cold for Hours】Tlater coffee travel mug with insulation for maximum temperature resistance, keeps your drink hot/frozen for up to 6 hours. Pour hot or frozen coffee into your insulated travel mug and feel full of energy all the day. (Please press the buckle twice and hear a "boom" sound that indicates that the coffee cup is tightly closed and you do not have to worry about drinks leakage.)

【Travel Mugs with Lid for Hot Drinks Leakproof 】 One of the most important features of Tlater insulated coffee cup is to make sure it will not leak if it is overthrow or in your bag. Because a BPA FREE watertight screw cap is provided that can be securely fixed. Together with the silicone seal ring, this means your drink is airtight to minimize the risk of spillage.

【Stainless Steel Double Layer Coffee Cups】BPA Free insulated travel mugs for hot drinks is made of high quality stainless steel, sturdy and durable, prevents bacteria growth and keeps the drink without a special smell. Removable lid makes it very easy to keep your travel mug clean and hygienic. The double layer mug has a threaded cup sleeve for non-slip insulation. The wide cup opening makes it easier for you to wash and add ice or diced fruit.

【Perfect Capacity】The 380ml capacity of the travel mugs with beautiful shape and lightweight cup body give you a good feeling for use. You can enjoy coffee, tea, wine, juice, oatmeal pretty well. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use such as car, home, party, travel and office hours.

【Gifts & After-Sales Service】The double walled vacuum stainless steel coffee mug has been carefully coordinated with colors, a contrasting design that is fashionable and timeless. Tlater insulated travel mug is also a great gift for your family and friends. If you have any problems when buying or after receiving the travel mug, please contact us on time. We are happy to solve your problems.
【Tips】 1. We recommand hand wash only. 2. Please make sure the lid is fully screwed on if you want to put it into your bag.
description: Product Description Tlater Thermel Cups for Hot Drinks Leakproof If you don't necessarily have time to drink coffee right away, you can use Tlater coffee cups to keep your coffee warm. From a design point of view, this look of the wood is very aesthetic and the non-slip strip is very practical and can prevent it from slipping out of your hand. As for its function, there will be no problems, and a cup of hot drink will remain in this state for a long time. The lid with sealing function can stop leaks. Travel Mug Leakproof Enjoy your coffee anywhere. Coffee Cups with Lids Key switch 180 ° Non-slip coasters Reusable Coffee Cups Hand wash only. Large mouth, the palm of your hand can be easily inserted into the inside of the mug when cleaning Tlater 380ML Coffee Mug Enjoy a good coffee life anytime, anywhere! Tlater Reusable Coffee Mug What can Tlater coffee mug hold? Coffee Tea Juice Homemade drink Milkshakes and more Tlater Travel Coffee Mug The coffee mug used for heating is sturdy and durable and fits most cup holders. The travel mug is made of high quality 304 stainless steel and does not contain BPA, which can keep the taste and freshness of the drink. The Leakproof Coffee Mug is so cool you can't stand letting go! A rubber base is attached to the bottom of the coffee mugs, which can effectively prevent the coffee cup from slipping and tipping over.
